strengths: Hands-on distributed systems and high-throughput backend experience (Sociomantic: millions of HTTP requests/second, low-latency async I/O)
Active contributor to agentic AI infrastructure and MCP tooling at current role, showing direct relevance to the technical domain
Demonstrated polyglot adaptability across many environments and stacks, with open-source project leadership (GISCollective)
concerns: No executive or engineering-management experience: career is entirely individual-contributor and staff-level; no evidence of scaling or leading teams of 10–30+ engineers
Agentic AI experience is recent (April 2025) and described at a contributor level, not as an architect or decision-maker for production multi-agent systems
No meaningful fintech infrastructure depth: RIDE Capital tenure was brief and focused on investment tooling, with no evidence of credit risk, payment flows, or regulatory compliance work
response.justification: Bogdan is a technically strong individual contributor with credible distributed-systems and full-stack depth, and his current work on agentic tooling is directionally relevant, but the role demands an executive who has already operated at scale: building and governing engineering organizations, architecting production multi-agent AI systems with financial consequences, and engaging at board level. None of those dimensions are evidenced in his background, making him a poor fit for this CTO position at his current career stage.
